# Andruav/DroneEngage WebClient - Project Description

## Overview
Andruav/DroneEngage WebClient is a browser-based Ground Control Station (GCS) for drone monitoring and control, part of the Ardupilot Cloud Eco System. It provides a comprehensive web interface for real-time drone operations supporting both DroneEngage and Andruav systems.

## Architecture
- **Frontend Framework**: React 19.1.1 with modern functional components
- **UI Framework**: Bootstrap 5.3.3 with custom styling
- **Mapping**: Leaflet 1.8.0 with rotated markers and drawing tools
- **Communication**: WebSocket-based real-time communication with WebPlugin support
- **Internationalization**: i18next with support for Arabic, English, French, Spanish, and Russian
- **Legacy Support**: jQuery 3.7.1 for existing DOM manipulation

## Key Features
- Real-time drone monitoring and control
- Interactive map-based visualization with multiple tile sources
- Multi-language support (i18n) including RTL languages
- Video streaming and recording via WebRTC
- Mission planning and waypoint management
- Gamepad controller support
- ADS-B traffic integration
- Swarm/multi-drone operations
- WebPlugin mode for local deployment
- Theme system with dark/light modes

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/          # React components (login, dialogs, debug)
├── css/                 # Stylesheets and themes
├── js/                  # Core JavaScript modules
│   ├── server_comm/     # WebSocket and server communication
│   ├── CPC/            # Control Panel Components
│   ├── gamepad/        # Gamepad integration
│   └── helpers/        # Utility functions
├── pages/               # React page components
└── images/             # Static assets
```

## Core Modules
- **Authentication**: `js_andruav_auth.js` - Handles login with WebPlugin fallback
- **Communication**: `server_comm/js_andruav_ws.js` - WebSocket communication layer
- **MAVLink**: `js_mavlink_v2.js` - MAVLink protocol parsing
- **Mapping**: `js_leafletmap.js` - Leaflet map integration
- **Units**: `js_andruavUnit.js` - Drone unit management
- **Mission Planning**: `js_plan_mission.js`, `js_plan_fence.js` - Mission and geofence tools
- **Configuration**: `js_siteConfig.js` - Site and runtime configuration

## WebPlugin Mode
The application supports WebPlugin deployment for local operations:
- HTTPS authentication server on port 9443
- WebSocket hub on port 9212
- API key authentication for LAN access
- Automatic fallback to cloud connectivity
- Shared UnitID storage for multi-tab sessions

## Configuration
- **Site Config**: `public/config.json` - Runtime settings, server endpoints, feature flags
- **Module Versions**: Tracks compatible versions for DE, FCB, Andruav, and Camera modules
- **Feature Flags**: Granular control over experimental features
- **Map Sources**: Configurable tile providers (Mapbox, Stadia Maps, custom)
- **WebRTC**: ICE server configuration for video streaming

## Development Setup
- Node.js v16+ required
- HTTPS development server with SSL certificates
- ESLint configuration with React-specific rules
- Webpack configuration for production builds
- Legacy OpenSSL provider support for compatibility

## Communication Architecture
The system follows a modular communication pattern:
- **WebClient** ↔ **de_comm** (High-level Communication Gateway)
- **de_comm** ↔ **de_mavlink** (Drone Protocol Handler) via UDP
- **de_mavlink** ↔ **Physical Drone Interface**
- **de_common/de_databus** provides shared UDP-based message routing

## Security Features
- SSL/TLS encryption for development and production
- API key authentication for WebPlugin mode
- CORS handling for cross-origin requests
- Session management with localStorage persistence
- Captcha integration for login protection

## Target Platforms
- Modern browsers with ES6+ support
- Mobile-responsive design
- Touch-enabled interfaces
- RTL language support (Arabic)
- Gamepad controller integration

## Dependencies
Core runtime dependencies include React ecosystem, Bootstrap, Leaflet mapping, jQuery for legacy support, WebRTC for video, and various specialized libraries for drone operations, gamepad control, and internationalization.
